pub load_floor_sprites()   'call this method from main to load sprites
	debug(`screen spritedef 0 32 32 `uhex_byte_array_(@floor_0, 1024) `uhex_long_array_(@floor_0_colors, 18))

dat floor_tiles byte {
}0

con 'floor sprites
dat floor_0 byte {
}$01,$02,$02,$02,$02,$02,$03,$03,$02,$04,$04,$05,$04,$05,$04,$06,$04,$04,$04,$04,$04,$04,$04,$04,$03,$02,$03,$03,$02,$07,$02,$02,{

floor_0_colors long {

}%11111111_10001100_10001100_10001100,{ 'index=0x1  -  1
}%11111111_10100001_10100001_10100001,{ 'index=0x2  -  2

}%11111111_11000111_11000111_11000111,{ 'index=0x7  -  7
}%11111111_10011111_10011111_10011111,{ 'index=0x8  -  8
}%11111111_10100101_10100101_10100101,{ 'index=0x9  -  9
}%11111111_10011001_10011001_10011001,{ 'index=0xa  -  10
}%11111111_11001101_11001101_11001101,{ 'index=0xb  -  11
